## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavioural changes
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass locally
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] If the data pipeline changed: `python scripts/sanity_check.py --data-dir <path> --quick` passes
- [ ] No data files, checkpoints, or large binaries are committed
- [ ] Docs / README updated if user-facing behaviour changed
